projects.name: RustChain Agent Framework
projects.review_note: Comprehensive agent framework with robust P2P networking and mining capabilities. Excellent documentation and test coverage.

projects.name: ChainGuard Validator
projects.review_note: High-security blockchain validator with zero-trust architecture. Battle-tested in production environments.

projects.name: Neural Compute Mesh
projects.review_note: Distributed compute mesh optimized for AI workloads. Efficient resource allocation and scheduling.

projects.name: StreamCast Video Infrastructure
projects.review_note: Decentralized video streaming platform with content delivery network. Scales efficiently with peer-to-peer distribution.

projects.name: AgentOS Runtime
projects.review_note: Lightweight agent runtime with sandboxing and resource management. Excellent isolation and security model.

projects.name: BlockMesh P2P
projects.review_note: Robust peer-to-peer networking layer with gossip protocols and fault tolerance. Proven in high-throughput scenarios.

projects.name: RentCompute Marketplace
projects.review_note: Decentralized compute rental platform with fair pricing and reputation system. Smart contracts for automated payments.

projects.name: VideoChain Encoder
projects.review_note: High-performance video encoding with blockchain verification. Supports multiple codecs and quality profiles.
